items.title: Keychron Woot sale now live with up to 64% off aluminum and hot-swap keyboards, deals from just $35
items.summary:
Woot is currently offering a huge selection of Keychron keyboards at some of the lowest prices we’ve tracked for them. The sale includes a wide range of both wired and wireless models, with discounts reaching up to 64% and prices starting at just $34.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). Unlike Woot’s other sale event where we typically see some refurbished or open-box units mixed in, all keyboards in this event are brand-new and ship with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. You can also choose between tactile and linear switches on select models, so be sure to check them out below.

items.title: Amazon M4 MacBook Air clearance deals: 15-inch models up to $300 off, 13-inch $250 off
items.summary:
Alongside the launch deals on the brand new M5 lineup – just about all of them are $50 off at Amazon, Amazon is also clearing out a number of M4 MacBook Air models this weekend at particularly notable prices.
